author: codex-duplicate-audit

patch.value: Single-source Claude plugin capability inventory docs

Duplicate audit 2026-05-22: Claude plugin capability inventory is duplicated and already drifting between docs/CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN.md:45-83 and plugins/pm-claude/README.md:5-14 plus :101-174. The docs repeat counts and inventories for MCP tools, skills, slash commands, subagents, install modes, and pm_run actions. Current drift: docs/CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN.md:83 says 9 slash commands, while plugins/pm-claude/README.md:11 says 14; plugins/pm-claude/README.md:12 says 3 subagents but lists 4. Existing pm-rjgh covers PRD/CHANGELOG/marketplace/AGENTS hygiene and pm-js0r covers wrapper/smoke code, not this docs inventory drift.

One Claude plugin document is canonical for capability inventory; the other surface routes to it or uses generated inventory; slash command/subagent/tool counts agree with actual plugin files; docs-skills gate and relevant plugin smoke/docs checks pass.

value.author: codex-duplicate-audit
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: pm search 'Claude plugin capability inventory slash commands subagents docs README drift' found adjacent pm-rjgh, pm-js0r, and pm-ash0 but no active item for Claude docs capability inventory duplication.

message: Create duplicate-audit finding for Claude plugin docs inventory
